text: I always associated the Democratic Party as the Working Class party, but it seems now each party is at odds against everything and can"t agree on anything.

They seem to be overly concerned about social welfare programs, to the extent that they're not concerned about a balanced budget to the extreme - overzealous in their desire to do a great many programs.
They have a genuine concern for the general welfare. They seem to be overly concerned about social welfare programs, to the extent that they're not concerned about a balanced budget.

They seem to have a more sincere interest as far as foreign policy and fiscal responsibility.
